
### changing the cookie policy (1) 


* idea: no ‘‘third-party’’ cookies
* only send cookies for URL in address bar


### via ArsTechnica 


![](/web/arstech-3rd-party-cookie){}


### third-party cookie restrictions  {.smaller}


* Firefox: 
<hr class="vspace" />
* separate ‘cookie jar’ for each top-level domain
* tracker.com loaded from foo.com != tracker.com loaded from bar.com 
<hr class="vspace" />
* Safari:
* third-party cookies just blocked
